landing.subtitle: A science-based matching process rooted in self-knowledge, psychological compatibility, and mutual intent.

funnel.title: Structured Self-Discovery
funnel.description: Five progressive levels — from core values to behavioral preferences.

matching.title: Bidirectional Scoring
matching.description: Compatibility measured from both perspectives. No hidden asymmetry.

consent.title: Mutual Consent First
consent.description: Communication requires expressed interest from both sides.

verified.title: Identity Verified
verified.description: Multi-factor verification. Real people, serious intent.

question.label: The Question
question.title: You compare everything. Except the one thing that matters most.
question.p1: We research cars for months. Compare phones feature by feature. Inspect apartments down to the water pressure. Read reviews, analyze specs, calculate total cost of ownership.
question.quote: But when it comes to choosing the person we share our life with — we swipe. We hope. We gamble.
question.p2: The platforms built for this market are not designed to help you find a partner. Their revenue depends on you staying single. Every successful relationship is a lost subscriber.

industry.label: The Reality
industry.title: Every major dating platform. The same verdict.
industry.subtitle: Trustpilot ratings across the industry paint a consistent picture. These are not outliers.

verification.title: Multi-Step Verification
verification.description: Every profile verified through SMS, email, and photo analysis. No bots. No fakes.

depth.title: Structured Self-Discovery
depth.description: Five levels of self-description. Scientifically grounded personality assessment, not a photo contest.

transparency.title: Transparent Matching
transparency.description: See exactly why someone was suggested and how your score was calculated. No black boxes.

fairness.title: Fair Pricing
fairness.description: Monthly billing. One-click cancellation. No auto-renewal traps. No pay-to-see-likes.

privacy.title: Privacy by Design
privacy.description: GDPR-first. Minimal data collection. Full transparency on what is stored and why.

success.title: Designed for Deletion
success.description: Our success metric: people leaving in a happy relationship. When PRAGMA works, you don't need PRAGMA.

finalCta.title: Ready for something real?
finalCta.subtitle: Partnership is too important to leave to chance. Start with knowing yourself.

1.title: Foundation
1.description: Basic data, relationship intention, core values
1.analogy: Like choosing between an apartment or a house — what kind of life do you envision?

2.title: Character & Lifestyle
2.analogy: Like choosing the neighborhood, floor plan, and style — how do you live day to day?

3.title: Future & Goals
3.analogy: Like deciding on the lease term and finish standard — where are you headed?

4.title: Depth
4.analogy: Like special equipment — the things that make you uniquely you.

5.title: Fine-Tuning
5.analogy: Like choosing the window handles — small details that matter more than you think.

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.editorialResponsible: Responsible for Editorial Content (Section 18 para. 2 MStV)
impressum.disputeResolutionText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (OS):
impressum.disputeResolutionNote: We are neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.liabilityContentText: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages according to Section 7 para. 1 TMG under general laws. According to Sections 8 to 10 TMG, however, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
impressum.liabilityLinksText: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.
impressum.copyrightText: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, distribution, and any kind of use beyond the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.controllerText: The data controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is:
privacy.dpoText: As a dating platform processing special category data (Art. 9 GDPR), we have appointed a Data Protection Officer. Contact: datenschutz@pragma.app
privacy.dataCategoriesText: We process the following categories of personal data:
privacy.categoryAccount: Account data: email address, password (hashed), phone number
privacy.categoryProfile: Profile data: age, gender, location, relationship intention, values, lifestyle preferences
privacy.categorySpecial: Special category data (Art. 9 GDPR): sexual orientation, religious beliefs, health-related information (only with explicit consent)
privacy.categoryUsage: Usage data: access times, device information, interaction patterns
privacy.categoryMessages: Communication data: messages between matched users
privacy.categoryPayment: Payment data: subscription plan, billing information (processed by payment provider)
privacy.specialDataText: Our matching process collects and processes special category personal data including sexual orientation, religious beliefs, and health-related indicators. This data is processed exclusively based on your explicit consent (Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR). You may withdraw this consent at any time in your account settings. Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing prior to withdrawal.
privacy.basisConsent: Consent: for special category data, optional profile fields, analytics cookies
privacy.basisContract: Contract performance: for account creation, matching, messaging services
privacy.basisLegitimate: Legitimate interest: for security, fraud prevention, service improvement
privacy.basisSpecialConsent: Explicit consent for special categories: sexual orientation, religion, health data
privacy.purposeMatching: Providing and improving our compatibility matching service
privacy.purposeCommunication: Enabling communication between mutually consented matches
privacy.purposeSecurity: Ensuring platform security, fraud detection, and identity verification
privacy.purposeImprovement: Analyzing anonymized usage data to improve service quality
privacy.purposeLegal: Fulfilling legal obligations (e.g., tax, telecommunications law)
privacy.automatedDecisionsText: Our matching algorithm uses automated processing of your profile data to calculate compatibility scores. This constitutes profiling under Art. 22 GDPR. You have the right to request human review of any match decision, to express your point of view, and to contest the result. The algorithm considers weighted compatibility across five profile levels. No fully automated decisions with legal or similarly significant effects are made without your explicit consent.
privacy.recipientsText: Your personal data may be shared with the following categories of recipients:
privacy.recipientHosting: Hosting provider: Supabase (database, authentication, storage) — EU/EEA data processing
privacy.recipientAuth: Identity verification: KYC provider for document verification (data purged 90 days post-verification)
privacy.recipientPayment: Payment processor: for subscription billing (only payment data, no profile data)
privacy.recipientVerification: SMS provider: for phone number verification
privacy.transfersText: Where data is transferred outside the EU/EEA, we ensure adequate protection through EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or adequacy decisions pursuant to Art. 45 GDPR. Details of safeguards are available upon request.
privacy.retentionText: Account data is retained for the duration of your membership. Upon account deletion, all personal data is irreversibly deleted within 30 days, except where legal retention obligations apply. Verification documents are automatically purged 90 days after successful verification. Chat messages are deleted upon account deletion of either party. Audit logs are retained for 12 months for security purposes.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. Non-essential cookies (analytics, marketing) are only set with your explicit consent via our cookie banner (TTDSG Section 25). You can manage your cookie preferences at any time.
privacy.rightsIntro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rightAccess: Right of access — obtain a copy of your stored personal data
privacy.rightRectification: Right to rectification — correct inaccurate personal data
privacy.rightErasure: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten") — request deletion of your data
privacy.rightPortability: Right to data portability — receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.rightObjection: Right to object — object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacy.supervisoryText: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority. The competent authority for our company is:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Text: These General Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern the use of the PRAGMA platform ("Service"), operated by PRAGMA GmbH, Munich, Germany. By registering, you accept these Terms in their entirety.
terms.s2Text: Registration requires a minimum age of 18 years. Each person may maintain only one account. We reserve the right to verify your identity. Providing false information constitutes grounds for immediate account termination.
terms.s3Text: PRAGMA provides a structured matching service based on psychological compatibility analysis. The Service includes profile creation through a five-level funnel, bidirectional compatibility scoring, and mutual-consent-based communication. We do not guarantee specific outcomes, matches, or relationship success.
terms.s4Rule1: Provide truthful and accurate information in their profile
terms.s4Rule2: Not engage in harassment, hate speech, or discriminatory behavior
terms.s4Rule3: Not use the platform for commercial purposes, spam, or solicitation
terms.s4Rule4: Not upload illegal, violent, or sexually explicit content
terms.s4Rule5: Not attempt to circumvent platform security measures or reverse-engineer the matching algorithm
terms.s5Text: PRAGMA offers free and paid subscription tiers. Paid subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date. Prices are displayed inclusive of applicable VAT.
terms.s6Text: As a consumer within the EU, you have the right to withdraw from your subscription contract within 14 days without giving any reason (Section 312g BGB, Article 9 Consumer Rights Directive). To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us of your decision by an unequivocal statement (e.g., email). You may use the model withdrawal form available in your account settings. Upon timely withdrawal, all payments will be refunded within 14 days using the same payment method.
terms.s7Text: All content, design, software code, algorithms, and trademarks on the PRAGMA platform are the intellectual property of PRAGMA GmbH. Users retain rights to their uploaded content but grant PRAGMA a limited license to display it within the platform. The matching algorithm and scoring methodology are proprietary.
terms.s8Text: PRAGMA is liable without limitation for damages caused by intent or gross negligence. For slight negligence, liability is limited to foreseeable, contract-typical damages and only in case of breach of essential contractual obligations (cardinal obligations). Liability for data loss is limited to the typical recovery cost that would have been incurred with regular backups. These limitations do not apply to damages resulting from injury to life, body, or health.
terms.s9Text: You may delete your account at any time via Settings. Upon deletion, all personal data will be irreversibly removed within 30 days in accordance with GDPR Art. 17. PRAGMA reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, with prior notice where possible.
terms.s10Text: Data processing is governed by our Privacy Policy (Datenschutzerklärung). By using the Service, you acknowledge and consent to data processing as described therein. The Privacy Policy is available at /legal/datenschutz.
terms.s11Text: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG). For consumer disputes, the courts at the consumer's place of residence have jurisdiction. For merchants, Munich, Germany is the exclusive place of jurisdiction.
terms.s12Text: Should individual provisions of these Terms be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected. The invalid provision shall be replaced by a valid provision that comes closest to the economic purpose of the invalid provision.

origin.label: Origin Story
origin.title: Why we built PRAGMA.
origin.p1: We watched it happen around us. In our families. Among our closest friends. Brilliant, thoughtful people entering partnerships that were doomed from the start. Not because they lacked love, but because they never asked the right questions before committing.
origin.p2: We live in an age of precision. We research cars for months. We compare phones feature by feature. We inspect apartments down to the water pressure. We read reviews, analyze specs, calculate total cost of ownership.
origin.p3: But when it comes to choosing the person we share our life with, we gamble. We swipe. We hope. We leave the most consequential decision of our lives to chance, chemistry, and a few curated photos.
origin.p4: The existing platforms are not designed to change this. Their business model depends on you staying single. Every successful relationship is a lost subscriber. So they optimize for engagement, not connection. For time spent, not time well spent.
origin.quote: Nothing in life is compared as carelessly as the person you choose to build a future with.
origin.p5: PRAGMA was born from the belief that partnership deserves the same rigor we apply to every other significant decision. Not cold calculation, but structured self-knowledge: Who am I, really? What do I need? What can I offer? Where are my non-negotiables?
origin.p6: The name says it all. Pragmatic. Measured. Intentional. Because love deserves better than an algorithm designed to keep you swiping.

problem.label: The Industry
problem.title: A broken industry.
problem.subtitle: Every major dating platform shares the same Trustpilot rating: catastrophic. The same complaints, across all of them, year after year. These are not isolated incidents. They are features of a system designed against its users.
problem.source: Source: Trustpilot aggregate ratings, April 2026. Based on six leading platforms across all major categories.

fakeProfiles.title: Fake Profiles
fakeProfiles.description: 80-99% fake profiles reported. Platforms tolerate them to inflate user numbers.

payToPlay.title: Pay-to-Play Traps
payToPlay.description: Blurred likes, artificial scarcity, accidental purchases engineered by design.

noBans.title: Arbitrary Bans
noBans.description: Accounts disabled without explanation, often immediately after payment. No refunds.

noSupport.title: Zero Support
noSupport.description: Automated responses only. Emails ignored for weeks. No human contact available.

algorithmManipulation.title: Algorithm Manipulation
algorithmManipulation.description: Likes flood in when subscriptions expire. Premium users get less visibility. Shadow bans.

subscriptionTraps.title: Subscription Traps
subscriptionTraps.description: Auto-renewal without warning. 2-year contracts in the fine print. Cancellation near-impossible.

safetyFailures.title: Safety Failures
safetyFailures.description: No meaningful verification. Scammers collect personal data. No accountability.

noRealMatching.title: No Real Matching
noRealMatching.description: Preferences for age, distance, lifestyle are systematically ignored.

ghosting.title: Ghosting Normalized
ghosting.description: Inactive profiles shown as active. Matches never respond. Effort goes unrewarded.

engagementOverConnection.title: Engagement over Connection
engagementOverConnection.description: Business model requires users to stay single. Successful relationships mean lost revenue.

superficiality.title: Snap Judgments
superficiality.description: Swipe-based decisions in milliseconds. No space for personality or depth.

dataExploitation.title: Data Exploitation
dataExploitation.description: Phone numbers harvested. Photos used without consent. Forced data collection.

verification.title: Multi-Step Verification
verification.description: Every profile is verified through SMS, email, and photo analysis. No bots. No fakes. Real people with serious intent.

depth.title: Structured Self-Discovery
depth.description: Five progressive levels of self-description, from core values to behavioral nuances. Scientifically grounded personality assessment, not a photo contest.

transparency.title: Transparent Matching
transparency.description: You see exactly why someone was suggested and how your compatibility score was calculated. No black-box algorithms. No manipulation.

fairness.title: Fair Pricing
fairness.description: Monthly billing. One-click cancellation. No auto-renewal traps. No pay-to-see-likes schemes. What you pay for is what you get.

privacy.title: Privacy by Design
privacy.description: GDPR-first architecture. Minimal data collection. Full transparency on what is stored and why. Your data belongs to you.

success.title: Designed for Deletion
success.description: Our success metric is people leaving the platform in a happy relationship. Unlike others, we mean it. When PRAGMA works, you do not need PRAGMA anymore.

name.label: The Name
name.title: PRAGMA.
name.description: In ancient Greek philosophy, pragma refers to the practical, rational form of love. Not reckless passion, but deliberate partnership. A choice made with open eyes. PRAGMA is the conviction that lasting relationships are not found by chance. They are built through self-knowledge, honesty, and the courage to ask the right questions before saying yes.

cta.title: Ready for something real?
cta.subtitle: Partnership is too important to leave to chance. Start with knowing yourself.

report.submittedDescription: Merci. Notre équipe examinera ce signalement dans les 24 heures.

report.notLoggedIn: Vous devez être connecté(e) pour signaler un utilisateur.

support.title: Aide et Support
support.subtitle: Trouvez des réponses aux questions fréquentes ou contactez notre équipe.

whatIsPragma.a: PRAGMA est une plateforme de mise en relation basée sur la science qui utilise la découverte de soi structurée et le scoring de compatibilité bidirectionnel pour créer des connexions significatives. Contrairement aux applications de rencontres traditionnelles, nous privilégions la profondeur, la vérification et le consentement mutuel.

howMatching.q: Comment fonctionne l'algorithme de mise en relation ?
howMatching.a: Notre algorithme évalue la compatibilité sur cinq niveaux progressifs -- des valeurs fondamentales aux préférences comportementales. Chaque mise en relation est évaluée bidirectionnellement, ce qui signifie que la compatibilité est mesurée des deux perspectives. Les scores sont pondérés et les critères rédhibitoires sont respectés.

whyFunnel.q: Pourquoi dois-je compléter le parcours d'intégration ?
whyFunnel.a: Le parcours garantit que chaque utilisateur sur PRAGMA a investi du temps dans une véritable introspection. Cela produit des mises en relation de meilleure qualité et filtre les utilisateurs qui ne recherchent pas sérieusement un(e) partenaire.

isDataSafe.q: Mes données personnelles sont-elles en sécurité ?
isDataSafe.a: Oui. Nous sommes entièrement conformes au GDPR et ne traitons les données de catégories spéciales qu'avec votre consentement explicite. Toutes les données sont chiffrées en transit et au repos. Nous ne vendons jamais vos données à des tiers. Vous pouvez exporter ou supprimer vos données à tout moment depuis les Paramètres.

howCancel.a: Allez dans Paramètres > Abonnement et cliquez sur 'Gérer l'Abonnement'. Vous pouvez annuler à tout moment. Votre abonnement reste actif jusqu'à la fin de la période de facturation en cours.

howDelete.a: Allez dans Paramètres et faites défiler jusqu'en bas. Cliquez sur 'Supprimer le Compte'. Cette action est irréversible et supprimera définitivement toutes vos données conformément à l'Article 17 du GDPR (Droit à l'Effacement).

howVerify.q: Pourquoi la vérification d'identité est-elle requise ?
howVerify.a: La vérification garantit que chaque utilisateur sur PRAGMA est une personne réelle avec une intention sérieuse. Cela vous protège des faux profils, du catfishing et des arnaques -- la plainte numéro un concernant les applications de rencontres traditionnelles.

howContact.a: Envoyez-nous un e-mail à support@pragma.app. Nous visons à répondre dans les 24 heures les jours ouvrables.

support.contactDescription: Notre équipe de support est là pour vous aider. Contactez-nous et nous vous répondrons dès que possible.
